Off Calendar Feb-09-2011 Granted Per Written Order

Off Calendar Jan-19-2011 Continued To Feb-09-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Status Report
Off Calendar Dec-13-2010 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Status Report
Off Calendar Nov-29-2010 Continued To Dec-13-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad for Ben Schalit (Executor).

Mr. Melbostad stated that they got the account to balance, that he had a draft of the accounting and requested three weeks to file it. Mr. Melbostad has until close of business tomorrow to file the accounting petition. If the petition is not filed by then, sanctions in the amount of $25.00 per day begin to run against Mr. Melbostad. The matter was continued to December 13, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If sanctions begin to run, Counsel will need to appear on that date.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Status Report
Off Calendar Nov-15-2010 Continued To Nov-29-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad for Benjamin Schalit.

Mr. Melbostad stated that he needed an extra week to complete the petition. The matter was continued to November 29, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Status Report
Off Calendar Oct-04-2010 Continued To Nov-15-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad for Benjamin Schalit.

Mr. Melbostad stated that there is a very small insolvent estate, that they have a petition for final distribution drafted, that they are waiting on one number, and that they would need a thirty day continuance to get the petition for final distribution on file. The Court continued the matter to November 15, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for the filing of the petition for final distribution or a status report on the administration. The Court informed Counsel that if he files a status report on the administration then it needs to be noticed for hearing.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda.
